concept: Let me suggest a survival game where you maintain the last functioning lighthouse on a coastline where the boundary between ocean and sky has dissolved into a singular abyssal domain. Navigate the deteriorating structure as architecture gradually inverts and rooms rearrange according to tidal influences. Signal to passing vessels using complex lens configurations that momentarily stabilize reality in specific patterns. Collect fragments of maritime lore to understand the cosmic event that merged horizons and perhaps discover how to restore the natural order.
